criteria.success_condition: Invocation of script with '--help' flag displays usage instructions, version, and exit code 0 without errors.
Script rejects task names exceeding maximum length and specific invalid characters with a descriptive error message rather than generic failure.
View command correctly displays task status indicators (e.g., 'pending', 'done') as defined in the storage file format.

criteria.measurement_method: Measure wall-clock time for 10 consecutive add/view/remove operations and calculate average.
criteria.fallback_if_tool_unavailable: Manual stopwatch measurement for 5 operations; if average exceeds 200ms, mark as failed.

criteria.threshold: 0 vulnerabilities detected related to command injection or shell execution
criteria.measurement_method: Run static analysis on the script source code; verify no unsafe shell calls found.
criteria.fallback_if_tool_unavailable: Manual code review of all shell command invocations to ensure argument escaping.

criteria.threshold: File permissions must be 0600 or 0644 (owner read/write only)
criteria.measurement_method: Execute 'stat -c %a tasks.txt' immediately after write operation.
criteria.fallback_if_tool_unavailable: Manual inspection of file listing in terminal.

criteria.threshold: 0 data loss across 1000 simulated crash scenarios
criteria.measurement_method: Inject interrupts during write operations; verify file integrity post-recovery.
criteria.fallback_if_tool_unavailable: Manual interruption simulation (Ctrl+C) followed by file checksum verification.

criteria.threshold: 0 warnings regarding missing docstrings or header comments
criteria.measurement_method: Run linter on the script; check for header block and function docstrings.
criteria.fallback_if_tool_unavailable: Manual review of code comments and header block.

criteria.threshold: Help flag output is clear, concise, and compatible with assistive technology
criteria.measurement_method: Verify output is plain text and does not rely on visual-only elements.
criteria.fallback_if_tool_unavailable: Manual verification of text output structure.

scenarios.description: Verify input sanitization logic prevents shell metacharacters from executing unintended commands.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Input containing ';', '|', '&' results in sanitized output or rejection, not command execution.

scenarios.description: Verify atomic write logic ensures file consistency after power loss.
scenarios.pass_criteria: File state remains consistent (no partial writes) after simulated crash during write operation.

scenarios.description: Verify help flag output meets accessibility standards for screen readers.
scenarios.pass_criteria: Output structure is linear and semantic, allowing screen readers to parse usage information correctly.
